rows.label: qev041801_MSG0001
rows.name:
Food, mo! Food, mo! Adjunct
Pissa, hurry up and serve the
poron tulip pollen, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0002
rows.name:
Did you not just eat, mo? Potepote,
you are eating a little too much, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0003
rows.name:
Food supplies have been running low
lately as it is, mo. Please act with
some self-awareness as the leader...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0004
rows.name:
Gah! This is a leader's order, mo!
If you rebel, you will be subjected
to the tickle punishment, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0005
rows.name: Ugh... This is power harassment, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0006
rows.name:
I am the one with the authority here,
mo! Now, if you will not listen to what
I say, I will tickle you right now...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0007
rows.name:
...Wait, what is with you, mo? Why
did you come to a place like this,
mo? Did you bring food, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_JNK0010
rows.name: Explain

rows.label: qev041801_SEL0011
rows.name: Explain the request received from Ngogo.

rows.label: qev041801_JNK0020
rows.name: Offer

rows.label: qev041801_SEL0021
rows.name: Offer to let him try some of your travel rations.

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0008
rows.name:
*Munch*... Pttbbt! What are you
trying to accomplish by feeding
me something so disgusting, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0009
rows.name:
Potepote is a bourgeoisie who only
eats the highest quality pollen, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0010
rows.name:
...Huh? Ngogo asked you to come request
the launching of fireworks, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0011
rows.name:
And you are saying Potepote has to
come to Grandpa's place, mo? Ugh...
just hearing about it is a pain, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0012
rows.name:
That is no good, Potepote, mo. Even if he is
a sexually harassing old geezer, he is the
Elder. We must listen to his request, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0013
rows.name:
...However, this caravan has a shortage
of materials, and we do not have the
ingredients for fireworks, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0014
rows.name:
So, could you please gather some Hellfire
Gates and Autiga Powder for us, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0015
rows.name:
Ah, if you do that, I want you to bring some
poron tulips while you are at it, mo. If you
do, I will launch fireworks for you, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0016
rows.name:
Potepote's stomach is rumbling, mo! If you
want the fireworks launched, go fetch the
fireworks materials and the poron tulips, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0017
rows.name:
*Sniff* *Sniff*... This scent
is poron tulips, mo! You, hurry
up and hand them over, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0018
rows.name:
If you also have the materials
for the fireworks, please give
those to me as well, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0019
rows.name:
Ooh! These are top-quality, mo!
Pissa, you should always bring me
things of this quality too, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0020
rows.name:
But there are no good things
like that around here...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0021
rows.name:
Do not talk back to me, mo! The leader
of this caravan is Potepote, mo! There
is a rule of absolute obedience, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0022
rows.name: Ugh... What a dictator, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0023
rows.name:
Also, Pissa is going to go to Grandpa Nun's
place, mo. It is too much of a pain for
Potepote to go all the way out there, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0024
rows.name:
Eh... Eeeeeeeeh!? I absolutely
refuse to do that, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0025
rows.name:
Every time we meet at the general assembly, Pissa
suffers terrible sexual harassment from the Elder,
mo! If I sued, I would definitely win, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0026
rows.name:
I do not care about that, mo.
Do you not also think it is
better for Pissa to go, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_JNK0040
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev041801_SEL0041
rows.name: Agree that Nun would probably be more cheered up if Pissa went.

rows.label: qev041801_JNK0030
rows.name: Disagree

rows.label: qev041801_SEL0031
rows.name: Persuade Potepote that as the grandson, he is the one who should go.

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0032
rows.name:
You are quite a promising one,
mo. I might even use you as an
advisor while Pissa is away, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0033
rows.name:
W-What! This is far too cruel
of an arrangement, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0034
rows.name:
It is two against one, mo. Pissa,
leave the fireworks to Potepote and
go to Grandpa Nun's place, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0035
rows.name:
Come on! If you do not hurry
and go, you get the tickle
punishment after all, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0036
rows.name:
Ugh... Sexual harassment and
power harassment... Your family
is the absolute worst, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0027
rows.name:
That is right, that is right, mo! Besides,
the fireworks will not be made properly
if it is not Pissa doing it, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0028
rows.name:
Then I will go right now and announce
to everyone in the caravan that Potepote
is departing to be with Nun, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0029
rows.name:
Ah... she ran away, mo! Damn it.
If she tells everyone, I will really
have no choice but to go, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0030
rows.name:
I truly, from the bottom of my heart, do not
want to go, but... Since it cannot be helped,
I will go show my face to Grandpa Nun, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0031
rows.name: Hmph... You better be grateful, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0037
rows.name:
I am hungry, mo! Grandpa, give
me something to eat, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0038
rows.name:
*Cough* *Cough*... Potepote, what in
the world did you come here for, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0039
rows.name:
I will just casually launch some
fireworks, so leave it to me, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041801_MSG0040
rows.name:
...Ah, if you see Pissa, tell
her to pick some flowers from
around there as a souvenir, mo.[ST:wait ]
